race.description: Campbell & George Defence Force Cup Hcp
race.comment: BUTTERFLY STYLE (7) stuck on well from midfield, beaten 2.3L after being slowly away in the Queen Of The South at Wagga most recently. She looks well placed here third-up with Boudvillain in the saddle. Should get every chance in the run and can looks the one to beat. WAL'S ANGELS (6) finished off well fresh before getting the job done at Bathurst last time out in a CL4. Fitter again now and he has won 2/3 when third-up. Can roll forward and prove tough to run down. SOUL LADY (5) bounced back last start when only 1.6L off the winner at Moruya after a flat start to the campaign. Likely to get back in the run, but gets back onto her home deck and can fly over the top of them late. SILENT IMPACT (3) can sit handy from the inside draw today after closing nicely last start at Canberra. Can be in the finish. CHASING A QUID (4) was a scratching last week on vet's advice but was in good touch prior. Winning hope.
